name: Seismic Learning (formerly Lessonly) API
what_it_does: Seismic Learning (formerly Lessonly) REST API for sales enablement training, employee onboarding, coaching, and practice scenarios. Enables AI agents to manage lesson and training assignment for automated sales onboarding workflow, handle practice session and role-play scenario for automated sales coaching, access completion tracking and performance metrics for sales training effectiveness automation, retrieve skill assessment and readiness scoring for sales team capability intelligence, manage course creation and content library for training content automation, handle team onboarding checklist and path management for new hire training workflow, access coaching feedback and manager visibility for performance enablement automation, retrieve certifications and readiness gates for sales rep authorization automation, manage user and team management for organizational training alignment, and integrate Seismic Learning with Seismic sales enablement, Salesforce, Slack, and Microsoft Teams for embedded sales training workflow.
use_cases: Onboarding sales reps from revenue enablement agents
Tracking sales readiness from sales training agents
Managing coaching from sales performance agents
Certifying reps from product training agents
not_for: General corporate compliance training (use Absorb or TalentLMS)
Frontline/deskless workforce training without sales focus
best_when: A B2B sales organization or revenue operations team wanting AI agents to automate sales rep onboarding, product training, coaching scenarios, readiness certification, and sales team training analytics within Seismic Learning integrated with Seismic sales enablement.
avoid_when: SEISMIC ACQUISITION PRODUCT INTEGRATION CHANGES: Lessonly was acquired by Seismic in 2021 and rebranded as Seismic Learning; API and product architecture are evolving as Lessonly integrates into Seismic platform; verify current Seismic Learning API stability and Lessonly legacy API deprecation timeline before integration investment. GDPR EU EMPLOYEE TRAINING DATA: Automated Seismic Learning processing of EU employee training data, coaching recordings, and performance assessments constitutes employment data under GDPR; automated retention beyond employment period creates GDPR violation. SALES COACHING RECORDING CONSENT: Automated practice role-play recording and coaching feedback via Seismic Learning requires participant consent; automated recording of coaching sessions without consent creates wiretapping and state two-party consent law exposure. Readiness gate automation for regulated products — automated sales rep authorization for regulated financial or insurance products based on Seismic Learning certification must verify regulatory licensing (Series 6/7, life insurance license) separately; product knowledge certification does not substitute for regulatory licensing.

auth.notes: Seismic Learning (formerly Lessonly) uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Diego, California HQ (Seismic Software, Inc.). Lessonly founded 2012 in Indianapolis, Indiana. Seismic acquired Lessonly in 2021 for approximately $200M. Seismic is a sales enablement platform company. Combined Seismic + Lessonly: 2,000+ enterprise customers including IBM, American Express, Hubspot. Competes with MindTickle and Highspot for sales enablement training.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription bundled with Seismic or as standalone
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; standalone Seismic Learning or bundled with Seismic sales enablement platform
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. Seismic Software. Lessonly acquired 2021 (~$200M). 2,000+ enterprise customers. Annual subscription, standalone or Seismic bundle.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; lesson and completion API throttled per tier

known_agent_gotchas: LESSONLY-TO-SEISMIC-LEARNING API MIGRATION: Lessonly legacy API endpoints are being migrated to Seismic Learning API post-acquisition; Lessonly API documentation may reference deprecated endpoints; verify current active API endpoint domain with Seismic before new integration build

COACHING ROLE-PLAY RECORDING CONSENT: Automated practice session recording via Seismic Learning for coaching analysis requires explicit participant consent in two-party consent states (California, Illinois, Washington); automated recording without consent creates wiretapping statute violation

GDPR EU EMPLOYEE TRAINING AND COACHING DATA: Automated EU employee training records, coaching feedback, and readiness assessment data in Seismic Learning is employment data under GDPR; automated retention beyond employment relationship and coaching recording beyond retention policy creates GDPR violation

Sales readiness gate for regulated product authorization — automated sales rep access authorization to regulated financial or insurance product sales based on Seismic Learning certification does not substitute for regulatory license verification; Series 6/7, life insurance, or state-regulated products require separate regulatory licensing check

Seismic integration for content and learning alignment — Seismic Learning and Seismic content enablement platform have distinct data models; automated workflow that assumes shared user and content IDs across Seismic and Seismic Learning may need mapping table; verify unified user ID management between both platforms

Completion webhook reliability for Salesforce opportunity gates — Seismic Learning completion webhooks used to gate Salesforce opportunity stages or enable product demos must implement idempotent processing; duplicate webhook delivery can trigger multiple Salesforce automation flows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sales enablement training. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Employee training and coaching data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sales training. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Sales training and coaching data.
